title: acmella ramosa
intro: Acmella ramosa, also known as the Sensitive Plant or Toothache Plant, is a tropical plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for toothaches and other oral health issues. The health benefits of Acmella ramosa include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to soothe mouth ulcers and gum inflammation. Acmella ramosa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream for its medicinal properties, and is also used in some herbal remedies to freshen breath and promote oral health.
